idx_activities_external_unique.name: idx_activities_external_unique
idx_activities_external_unique.where: "activities"."external_id" is not null and "activities"."provider" is not null

idx_activity_plans_import_identity.name: idx_activity_plans_import_identity
idx_activity_plans_import_identity.where: "activity_plans"."import_provider" is not null and "activity_plans"."import_external_id" is not null

activity_plans_system_template_check.name: activity_plans_system_template_check
activity_plans_system_template_check.value: ("activity_plans"."is_system_template" = true and "activity_plans"."profile_id" is null) or ("activity_plans"."is_system_template" = false and "activity_plans"."profile_id" is not null)

activity_plans_has_content.name: activity_plans_has_content
activity_plans_has_content.value: "activity_plans"."structure" is not null or "activity_plans"."route_id" is not null

idx_events_external_identity_unique.name: idx_events_external_identity_unique
idx_events_external_identity_unique.where: "events"."source_provider" is not null and "events"."integration_account_id" is not null and "events"."external_calendar_id" is not null and "events"."external_event_id" is not null

idx_events_integration_calendar_updated.name: idx_events_integration_calendar_updated
idx_events_integration_calendar_updated.where: "events"."integration_account_id" is not null and "events"."external_calendar_id" is not null

events_recurrence_timezone_requires_rule.name: events_recurrence_timezone_requires_rule
events_recurrence_timezone_requires_rule.value: "events"."recurrence_timezone" is null or "events"."recurrence_rule" is not null

events_source_identity_complete.name: events_source_identity_complete
events_source_identity_complete.value:
(
        "events"."source_provider" is null
        and "events"."integration_account_id" is null
        and "events"."external_calendar_id" is null
        and "events"."external_event_id" is null
      ) or (
        "events"."source_provider" is not null
        and "events"."integration_account_id" is not null
        and "events"."external_calendar_id" is not null
        and "events"."external_event_id" is not null
      )

training_plans_template_profile_check.name: training_plans_template_profile_check
training_plans_template_profile_check.value: ("training_plans"."is_system_template" = true and "training_plans"."profile_id" is null) or ("training_plans"."is_system_template" = false and "training_plans"."profile_id" is not null)
